narrative: USD/JPY hits a 40-year high at 163.02 as rising yields and crude prices firm the dollar — gold higher +1.57% near $4,079; equities +0.80%; DXY +0.18%; VIX 17.2. USD/CAD tests 1.4101 on a 50% tariff shock to Canadian goods, while NZD/USD holds 0.5831 after CPI data supports the RBNZ's 2.5% hawkish bias. Fed-BoJ 275bp OIS carry sustains the JPY sell-off despite moderate put skew in 25d risk reversals. Watch the next ECB meeting on July 23.
